public async Task<Guid> Create(string filename, string fileType, MemoryStream outputStream)
{
    const int maxAttempts = 3;
    const int retryDelayMilliseconds = 2000;

    Exception? lastException = null;

    for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= maxAttempts; attempt++)
    {
        try
        {
            _logger.LogInformation(
                "DIA Dataverse staging save attempt {Attempt} of {MaxAttempts} started for file {FileName}.",
                attempt,
                maxAttempts,
                filename);

            var deStagingRecord = new icow_deceasedestatestaging();
            deStagingRecord.icow_filename = filename;
            deStagingRecord.statecode = icow_deceasedestatestaging_statecode.Active;
            deStagingRecord.icow_FileType = fileType;

            Guid recordId = await _dataverseRepo.CreateAsync(deStagingRecord);

            outputStream.Position = 0;

            await _dataverseRepo.UploadFileToColumnAsync(
                tableLogicalName: "icow_deceasedestatestaging",
                rowId: recordId,
                fileColumnLogicalName: "icow_file",
                fileName: filename,
                mimeType: "text/plain",
                fileStream: outputStream
            );

            _logger.LogInformation(
                "DIA Dataverse staging save succeeded for file {FileName}. RecordId: {RecordId}.",
                filename,
                recordId);

            return recordId;
        }
        catch (Exception ex) when (attempt < maxAttempts)
        {
            lastException = ex;

            _logger.LogWarning(
                ex,
                "DIA Dataverse staging save attempt {Attempt} of {MaxAttempts} failed for file {FileName}. Retrying after {RetryDelayMilliseconds} ms.",
                attempt,
                maxAttempts,
                filename,
                retryDelayMilliseconds);

            await Task.Delay(retryDelayMilliseconds);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            lastException = ex;

            _logger.LogError(
                ex,
                "DIA Dataverse staging save failed after {MaxAttempts} attempts for file {FileName}.",
                maxAttempts,
                filename);
        }
    }

    throw new InvalidOperationException(
        $"D365 staging save failed after retry exhaustion for file {filename}.",
        lastException);
}
